sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2426" key="ai(matopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰτο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n2426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to make into blood</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0726.tlg001:2:74D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.74D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
